why: CHART: consolidation (7113-7122) resolved UP — 10:15 breaks to fresh HOD 7124.9 after higher lows, above rising VWAP-proxy 7114, 5-min momentum turning +0.08%. GEX CONFIRM: king 7150 pika magnet strengthening (+21M->+29M) 25pts above with no wall between, negative-gamma regime means a break trends/accelerates rather than reverting. Target the 7150 magnet, cap winner there.

CHART: breakout thesis failed — 10:30 candle rolled 7129->7124 (double rejection at 7129.7), 5-min and 15-min momentum both flipped negative, price back at entry/breakout zone. GEX: king magnet stopped building (35M->30M) and negative-gamma + no floor below risks a downside flush. Cut at breakeven, no reason to hold a stalled long into negative-gamma downside.

CHART: multi-hour pin (7118-7124) broke DOWN — 12:30 candle sliced to 7113.9, decisive lower low below range and below VWAP 7120.7, momentum negative both 5m(-0.04%) and 15m(-0.07%). GEX CONFIRM: structural flip — the 7120 pika FLOOR gave way and is now resistance overhead (+15.7M), and the KING flipped from 7150 pika(above) to 7080 BARNEY(-18M) below = dominant negative-gamma magnet/fuel now BELOW price, no floor under spot, negative-gamma regime flushes. This GEX flip is absent from the morning fake probes. Target the 7080 barney.

CHART: breakdown failing — price recovered from 7113.9 low back to 7119.2 (toward VWAP), 5-min momentum flipped positive, no follow-through flush. GEX: the confirmation reversed — the 7120 pika that was overhead resistance dissolved (nearest resistance now 7140), and a new pika FLOOR formed at 7085; the no-floor-below/floor-as-resistance basis for the short is gone. Cut small loss, consistent with the day full of failed probes, before a squeeze back into the range.
